description: Post-filtering configuration for BindCraft accepted designs (developability-focused scoring)
_philosophy: BindCraft already filtered for binding quality. Post-filter scores DEVELOPABILITY: protease resistance, aggregation risk, manufacturability. Use severe thresholds for rejection.
_comment_scoring_weights: Developability score components (0-100 scale, higher is better)
_note_scoring: Sum of weights should equal 1.0. These are developability metrics - BindCraft metrics (pLDDT, iPAE, contacts) are NOT heavily weighted
_comment_rejection: Only reject designs with SEVERE issues. Use scoring for everything else.
_note_protease: Affects developability score. Rejection: only if >=4 severely exposed motifs
_note_kr: Affects developability score. Rejection: only if >35% of residues are exposed K/R
_note_histidine: Affects developability score. Rejection: only if >=6 His in spatial cluster or >10 total His
_note_loops: Affects developability score. Rejection: only if loop >25 residues
_note_plddt_patches: Affects developability score. Rejection: only if patch >15 residues (BindCraft already filtered mean pLDDT)
_note_interface: Minimal weight in developability score (BindCraft did this). Rejection: sanity check only if iPAE >12 or contacts <10
_note_aggregation: Major developability scoring factor. Rejection: only if >65% exposed hydrophobic or patch >15 residues
_note_charge: Affects developability score. Rejection: only if >=10 charged residues clustered
_note_buried_polars: Affects developability score. Rejection: only if >=8 buried unsatisfied polars
_note_self_binding: Affects developability score. Rejection: only if risk >0.85
_note_packing: Affects developability score. Rejection: only if min density <4
